title: Sealapack Turkey Flavour Lock Roasting Bags, Two Pack
features: PERFECT ROAST: Sealapack Turkey Roasting bags are suitable for cooking turkey and other poultry. Using these bags will retain the moisture and flavour of the food whilst keeping your roasting tray and oven clean.
CRISP & TASTY: The roasting bag allows the meat to cook exactly the same without the mess, ensuring the skin is evenly brown and crisp, no need for basting the meat during cooking.
OVEN & MICROWAVE: The bags are suitable to use in either the oven or for quicker, cleaner cooking, the bags can be used in a large microwave
EXTRA FLAVOUR: Add any spices or herbs to the bag, shake to coat the bag, add the meat and roast for the required cooking time
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 2 BAGS. EACH BAG 52 x 58cm
description: Sealapack Turkey Roasting bags are suitable for cooking turkey and other poultry. Using these bags will retain the moisture and flavour of the food whilst keeping your roasting tray and oven clean. The roasting bag allows the meat to cook exactly the same without the mess, ensuring the skin is evenly brown and crisp, no need for basting the meat during cooking. The bags are suitable to use in either the oven or for quicker, cleaner cooking, the bags can be used in a large microwave. Pack of 2 bags each 52 x 58cm
